name: Quick Silver 🜛
description: Named after my cat Mercury, who sadly ran away, causing me to shelve the project. QUICK was launched the day after the cat came back. The cat came back! 🐈‍⬛ 2% fee with 200 QUICK max fee per TX (~2 USD at launch)🜛 QUICK is a diversified basket my cat Mercury crafted while he was away. He's quick & silver, and he wanted it to be silver-backed like him. I told him best we could do was 11.9% Silver. To lower MC and allow more liquid-leaping* a new 0.01 USD starting price was enforced, keeping with 21M max supply. So we sat down, and I helped Mercury set up the pools on Orca, approximately: EASY 14.29%; XAUT0, PAXG, GLDX, SOL, JLP, CBBtC, whETH, BNB, XRP, USDC, REMXon, PALLon 4.76% each; VNXAU, GLDr, GLDon, IAUon, SLVr, CPERr, PPLTr, SPYx 2.38% each; SLVon 9.52%. Percentages and backing tokens may change over time to protect liquidity. 🜛 QUICK connects these listed metals, commodities, stablecoins, stocks, and crypto markets across Solana. We charge a premium, and use it to boost QUICK. Humble Mercury chose the silver symbol instead of his furrey face. Almost all fees go to buybacks, LPing, and ecosystem expansion, some fees go to dev, amount formalized before eoy 2028. FOR ENTERTAINMENT PURPOSES ONLY. NOT AN INVESTMENT PRODUCT, SECURITY, OR PROMISE OF RETURNS. NO REDEMPTION RIGHTS. SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT NOTICE. 🙏 *- We created Orca pools and put all 99.9%+ supply in it at launch. CA: QuicEPtN6QtDoMvmsWe5Xqb5da3FqBQWff7jh2cBXn7
